ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when site details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when site details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when weather type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when weather type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., exposed, shaded) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when data collection method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when data collection method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where data was collected */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of weather data */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the readme file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the readme file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when readme file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "day" TEXT /* Timestamp of the day when data was collected */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of weather data */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the weather data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when research team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when research team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when user accessed the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when team membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when team membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
